name: 1Panel
description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.
summaryZh: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
